banner.title: Signature Scheme.
banner.text:
• AUTHORIZATION: "Signature" HTTP Authentication Scheme
  • SIGNATURE: "Signature" HTTP Header
  • CUSTOM_HEADER: "Signature" Custom name HTTP Header

targetSignatureHeader.title: Custom Signature Header
targetSignatureHeader.description: Specify the HTTP header that will contain the generated HMAC signature

keyId.title: Key ID
keyId.description: The key ID used to sign (support EL).

secret.title: Secret
secret.description: The secret key used to sign (support EL).

headers.title: Headers
headers.description: List of headers to use for HTTP signature creation.

signHeaders.title: Include headers in signature generation
signHeaders.description: Base signing process on the request/response/message headers

signPayload.title: Include payload in signature generation
signPayload.description: Base signing process on the request/response/message payload (Required for response flow)

prependHeadersToBody.title: Prepend headers to body for signature generation
prependHeadersToBody.description: The defined headers will be prepended to the body for signature generation. (Only applicable if the signPaylonad option is enabled)

headersDelimiter.title: Delimiter
headersDelimiter.description: Specify a delimiter to separate each header and the body/message

signMethod.title: Include request method in signature generation
signMethod.description: Base signing process on the request method name (Highly recommended for request flow)

signUri.title: Include request URI in signature generation
signUri.description: Base signing process on the request URI name (Highly recommended for request flow)

created.title: Include the created timestamp in the signature
created.description: Add (created) header in the signature. (Highly recommended)

expires.title: Include the expires timestamp in the signature
expires.description: Add (expires) header in the signature. (Highly recommended)

validityDuration.title: Validity duration
validityDuration.description: Signature's maximum validation duration in seconds.

banner.title: Validity duration
banner.text: Signature's maximum validation duration in seconds. (Used only if the expires header is included in the signature.)
